description: Press reporting (Irish Times / Business Post 2021) vs OPR canonical list
value: press ~35/91% (lodged) vs OPR 14/16 = 87.5% (decided) 2018-2021 — same direction, different denominator definitions
notes: Press total of ~35 includes SHDs with JRs *lodged* (including those later settled, withdrawn, or still pending at press-time). OPR Appendix-2 is DECIDED cases only. Both sources report ~85-91% state loss rate in the same direction; the denominators differ by case-status definition not by counting error.
